basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Customer Relations Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Centre for Management Development (CMD) has officially announced the Customer Relations Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 40 openings. The detailed notification was published on 15-05-2026 at CMD Official Website. Candidates who meet the maximum age criteria of 45 years and hold an Engineering Diploma in any Discipline or B.Tech in any Discipline can now submit their online applications from 16-05-2026 to 23-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering Diploma in any Discipline, B.Tech in any Discipline
qualification.details: Engineering Diploma in any Discipline B.Tech in any Discipline

selection_process: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Customer Relations Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CMD Customer Relations Assistant recruitment is 23-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Customer Relations Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies announced for the Customer Relations Assistant post in the Centre for Management Development recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an Engineering Diploma in any Discipline or a B.Tech degree in any Discipline to be eligible for the Customer Relations Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Customer Relations Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Customer Relations Assistant post is 45 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Customer Relations Assistant role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Customer Relations Assistant post is Rs. 1010 Per Shift. This is based on an 8-hour shift.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Customer Relations Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Application Screening, Criteria-based Screening, Written Test, Group Discussion, Skill Test/Proficiency Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Customer Relations Assistant position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Centre for Management Development?
faq.answer: The official website of the Centre for Management Development is www.cmd.kerala.gov.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
